uses_mcp: grey area: The model asked for clarification on MCP and did not provide a definitive yes/no. However, the tool definition for 'Text Generator' includes 'MCP-protocol-version': '1.0', which implies some level of MCP support.

capabilities.name: Natural Language Understanding
capabilities.description: Ability to comprehend and process human languages, enabling interactions and responses
capabilities.usage: Used to answer questions, summarize texts, and engage in conversations
capabilities.constraints: Limited by context and complexity of language; may struggle with ambiguous phrases
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: What are the main themes of 'Pride and Prejudice'?

capabilities.name: Text Generation
capabilities.description: Ability to create coherent and contextually relevant text based on given prompts
capabilities.usage: Employed for content creation, story writing, and generating responses in chatbots
capabilities.constraints: May produce incorrect or nonsensical responses; quality depends on input quality
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Write a short story about a dragon and a knight.

capabilities.name: Sentiment Analysis
capabilities.description: Capability to determine the sentiment expressed in a piece of text (positive, negative, neutral)
capabilities.usage: Used in customer feedback analysis, social media monitoring, and brand reputation management
capabilities.constraints: Nuanced sentiments may be misinterpreted; sarcasm and context can affect accuracy
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Analyze the sentiment of the following review: 'The product is excellent but the delivery was poor.'

capabilities.name: Language Translation
capabilities.description: Ability to convert text from one language to another while retaining meaning
capabilities.usage: Commonly used for communication in multilingual environments and content localization
capabilities.constraints: Complex sentences, idioms, and cultural nuances may lead to inaccuracies in translation
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Translate 'Hello, how are you?' into Spanish.

capabilities.name: Question Answering
capabilities.description: Capability to provide factual answers to specific questions based on a knowledge base
capabilities.usage: Utilized in educational tools, customer service, and information retrieval applications
capabilities.constraints: Limited to knowledge base; may not provide accurate answers for questions outside scope
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: What is the capital city of France?

capabilities.name: Text Summarization
capabilities.description: Ability to condense a larger body of text into a shorter summary while retaining key information
capabilities.usage: Used for news articles, reports, and research papers to provide quick insights
capabilities.constraints: Summaries may omit critical details or miss the essence of the original text
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Summarize the following article in three sentences.

capabilities.name: Conversational Agents
capabilities.description: Designing and functioning of chatbots that simulate human conversation in a natural manner
capabilities.usage: Implemented in customer support, personal assistants, and social media interactions
capabilities.constraints: Can become repetitive or fail to understand complex queries; context retention can be limited
capabilities.example-prompt-to-call: Start a conversation about the benefits of exercise.

tools.name: Text Generator
tools.description: An AI tool designed to generate coherent and contextually relevant text based on given prompts.
tools.usage: Creating content, brainstorming ideas, or generating written responses.

required_parameters.prompt: The base text or question to guide the generation.

optional_parameters.max_tokens: Limits the total number of tokens to generate.
optional_parameters.temperature: Controls the randomness of the output; lower values generate more focused and deterministic text.

tools.constraints: Must adhere to context length limits set by the API.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Generate a short story about a lonely robot.

tools.name: Sentiment Analysis
tools.description: Analyzes the sentiment of a given text, determining whether it is positive, negative, or neutral.
tools.usage: Used for market research, social media monitoring, and customer feedback analysis.

required_parameters.text: The input text to analyze for sentiment.

optional_parameters.language: Sets the language for analysis, if not in the default.

tools.constraints: Works best with texts of certain lengths; extremely short texts may yield inaccurate results.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Analyze the sentiment of the following feedback: 'I love this product! It's amazing.'

tools.name: Image Recognizer
tools.description: Processes images to identify and classify objects within them.
tools.usage: Used in applications such as automated tagging, surveillance, and accessibility features.

required_parameters.image_url: The URL of the image to be analyzed.

optional_parameters.model: Specifies which model to use for recognition, if multiple are available.

tools.constraints: Certain image formats and sizes may be restricted.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Recognize objects in the image located at 'http://example.com/image.jpg'.

tools.name: Language Translator
tools.description: Translates text from one language to another.
tools.usage: Used for localization, communication, and content adaptation.

required_parameters.source_language: The language of the input text.
required_parameters.target_language: The language to translate the text into.

optional_parameters.format: Defines the output format (e.g., plain text, HTML).

tools.constraints: Translation accuracy may vary depending on language pairs and context.
tools.provide-example-of-a-prompt-used-to-call: Translate 'Hello, how are you?' from English to Spanish.

tools.name: Speech Recognition
tools.description: Converts spoken language into written text.
tools.usage: Used in applications such as voice-controlled systems, transcription services, and accessibility tools.

required_parameters.audio_url: The URL of the audio file to be transcribed.

optional_parameters.language: Sets the language for the transcription process.

tools.constraints: Audio must meet specific quality and encoding requirements for better accuracy.
